[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 0010011 3
2 1101011 5
3 1111111 a
4 0101100 3
5 0111111 6
6 1111100 5
7 1011111 6

01 10 1100110 4
12 21 0100011 3
23 32 0000101 2 match 0
34 43 1000101 3
45 54 0110000 2
56 65 1011100 4
67 76 1010011 4
70 07 0111010 4

24 42 1000000 1

71 17 1011100 4

50 05 0110101 4
61 16 0001111 4
72 27 1111111 a match 3

26 62 0101100 3 match 4
37 73 1111010 5
